name: Stibo Systems MDM & Product Data API
what_it_does: Stibo Systems STEP REST API for master data management (MDM) and product information management (PIM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog data creation, enrichment, and lifecycle management for MDM operations, handle customer and supplier master data quality and deduplication for enterprise data governance, access hierarchical product taxonomy and classification data for catalog management, retrieve attribute and specification data management for product information accuracy, handle workflow and publication management for controlled product data distribution, access multi-channel product content management for omnichannel commerce, retrieve data quality scoring and completeness metrics for MDM governance, manage supplier onboarding and product data submission workflows for supply chain, handle regulatory compliance data (REACH, RoHS, hazmat) linked to product records, and integrate master data with ERP, ecommerce, POS, and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Enriching product data from AI-powered catalog management agents
Deduplicating customer records from MDM governance agents
Publishing product content from omnichannel commerce agents
Onboarding supplier data from supply chain MDM agents
not_for: Simple product databases without enterprise MDM governance complexity
Single-system data management without multi-system master data integration
SMB product catalogs without enterprise hierarchy and workflow requirements
best_when: A retailer, manufacturer, or distributor using Stibo STEP wants AI agents to automate product data enrichment, master data quality management, catalog taxonomy management, supplier data onboarding, and multi-channel product content distribution.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Stibo STEP manages regulatory compliance attributes (REACH, RoHS, hazmat classifications) linked to product records — automated regulatory attribute changes without regulatory affairs review creates compliance exposure. MDM golden record updates affect multiple downstream systems simultaneously; automated data changes must be validated before publishing to ERP, ecommerce, and POS systems to prevent cascading incorrect data.

auth.notes: Stibo STEP uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Webhooks for data workflow events. REST API (STEP REST API) with JSON. Aarhus, Denmark HQ. Private (Stibo A/S — Danish printing and logistics conglomerate). Strong in retail, manufacturing, and distribution for MDM and PIM. STEP platform supports product, customer, supplier, and location MDM. Competes with Informatica MDM, Reltio, and Akeneo for enterprise MDM/PIM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by domain (product, customer), user count, and object volume
pricing.notes: Aarhus, Denmark. Founded 1977 (Stibo A/S). Stibo Systems is the MDM/PIM software division of the Stibo A/S printing and logistics group. 600+ enterprise customers. Strong in retail (Best Buy, Office Depot), manufacturing, and distribution. STEP platform: product MDM, customer MDM, supplier MDM, location MDM. Competes with Informatica MDM, Reltio, and Syndigo for enterprise MDM market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; deployment and volume dependent

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Regulatory attribute changes (REACH, RoHS, hazmat) in STEP require regulatory affairs review; automated compliance attribute updates without expert validation creates product safety and regulatory exposure
MDM golden record cascade impact — STEP golden record changes publish to downstream systems (ERP, ecommerce, POS); validate data quality before publishing to prevent cascading incorrect data
STEP data model complexity — STEP has a configurable object model (nodes, attributes, classifications); API data model reflects customer-specific STEP configuration, not a standard schema
Workflow-gated publishing — product data publication in STEP is workflow-controlled; automated direct updates may bypass required approval workflow steps
Object type specificity — STEP has product, supplier, location, and customer domain objects with different API endpoints and workflows; specify correct object domain in API calls
SaaS vs. on-premise deployment — Stibo offers cloud and on-premise STEP; some API capabilities and performance characteristics differ between deployment models
agent_readiness.security_notes: MDM and product data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Enterprise product, customer, and supplier master data.

security_score_components.security_notes: MDM platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Enterprise master data.
